metadata.title: Performance Appraisals | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered performance management platform for all your appraisal operations — from 360° feedback and real-time goals to automated appraisal cycles and survey design.

hero.title: Performance
hero.description: Unlock your team's full potential with 360° feedback, real-time goals, and automated appraisal cycles.

employeeQuestions: What has been the most challenging aspect?
What would I need to improve my work?
appraisal.managerFeedback: She can provide achievement that convinced you of the employee's value.

evaluationSection.title: Set up periodical employee evaluation
evaluationSection.subtitle: Strengthen your company's key asset : employees
evaluationSection.description: Maintain the motivational process in your company by doing periodical evaluations of your employees' performance. Regularly assess your human resources to bring benefits for your people as well as for your organization.

features.title: Easy follow-up
features.description: Clearly see the appraisal status for each employee or for the whole company.

features.title: Clear calendar view
features.description: Keep track of upcoming evaluations and send reminders to respondents.

features.title: Exportable answers
features.description: Turn every evaluation into a printable PDF form.

appraisalSection.title: Build the right appraisal
appraisalSection.subtitle: Ask the right questions and collect insightful information
appraisalSection.description: Create the right survey to collect your employees answers. Prepare your own templates or choose from existing ones. Manage several types of evaluations: bottom-up, top-down, self-evaluations, and final evaluation by the manager.

surveySection.title: Design your own survey
surveySection.subtitle: Use templates or create them your way
surveySection.description: Create your own surveys to gather important information and opinions from your employees. Quickly add questions, edit pages, and draft a useful survey using great built-in templates or making your own design from scratch.

automationSection.title: Automate the evaluation
automationSection.subtitle: process
automationSection.description: Make sure evaluations stick to the schedule
automationSection.explanation: Create evaluation plans with a clear schedule to automatically generate interview requests. Specify the employee, department or level in the hierarchy which can answer your surveys.

ctaBanner.title: Join 15 million users
ctaBanner.description: who grow their business with Adon
